dict.string: OpenAva needs full calendar access to list and read event details for local calendar tools.
OpenAva uses calendar access to run local calendar tools for your agent.
OpenAva can use write-only calendar access when creating events for local calendar tools.
OpenAva can capture photos or short video clips when requested by local camera tools.
OpenAva uses contacts access to run local contact tools for your agent.
OpenAva uses the local network to discover nearby OpenAva devices and OpenClaw gateways.
OpenAva can use location in the background when always-on location tools are enabled.
OpenAva uses location access to run local location tools for your agent.
OpenAva uses microphone access for camera clips and screen recording with audio.
OpenAva uses motion access to run local motion tools for your agent.
OpenAva uses photo library access to run local media tools for your agent.
OpenAva needs reminders access to list and create reminders for local reminder tools.
OpenAva uses reminders access to run local reminders tools for your agent.
OpenAva uses speech recognition to transcribe audio files into text for agent tools.
